_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.1 the PlayerVsNpcCalc.accuracy (player attack rolls) and PlayerVsNpcCalc.defenceRoll (getNPCDefenceRoll + defence reductions) paths are ported, so the 3 maxAttackRoll rows and the 3 npcDefRoll rows run; the 6 maxHit rows (maxMeleeHit/maxMagicHit) still skip.
